summary: The story revolves around a group of outsiders, likely from the Fury Tribe, who are approaching the land. The Royal Guard Captain is aware of this and is preparing for battle. He is frustrated with the sudden arrival of these outsiders and questions their intentions.
key_moments: The Royal Guard Captain receives information about an incoming attack
The captain prepares his team to defend against the approaching tribe
A heated exchange between the captain and one of the outsiders reveals tension and mistrust
